message:
fix: Show external packs from custom_paths in dcg packs listing

External packs loaded via [packs] custom_paths now appear in the
'dcg packs' command output alongside built-in packs.

Changes:
- Load external packs in Command::ListPacks handler before listing
- Include external packs by querying ExternalPackStore in list_packs()
- Add iter_packs() method to ExternalPackStore for pack iteration

Previously, custom packs were loaded and used for command evaluation,
but didn't appear in the packs listing, causing confusion.

Fixes: #28

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
